title: Agency Agent Override
description: Defines per-agent permission overrides that extend a template baseline. Agent files add or remove specific commands from their category's template.

$extends.description: Category name this agent extends. Must match a template filename (without .jsonc).

agent.description: Agent identifier. Must match the agent filename (without .jsonc extension).

permValue.description: Permission action: allow (auto-approve), deny (block), or ask (prompt user).

agentDoc.description: Optional documentation metadata for generators and audit reports.

agent_summary.description: One-line description of what this agent does.

override_rationale.description: Why this agent differs from its category baseline.

overrideBlock.description: Override configuration. Can be empty {} for agents that match their template exactly.

permissionOverride.description: Permission overrides to apply on top of the template baseline.

add.description: Commands to add or override. Keys are command patterns, values are permission actions.

remove.description: Command patterns to remove from the baseline.
